highlights.title: Live Split View
highlights.description: Left panel renders your markdown in real-time — headings, code blocks, tables, and images appear as the agent writes.

highlights.title: Click to Select
highlights.description: Click any paragraph, heading, or code block to tell the agent exactly what you mean by 'this section' or 'here'.

highlights.title: Inline Editing
highlights.description: Switch to Edit mode for a full markdown editor with formatting toolbar — bold, headings, code, lists, links — all auto-saved.
